description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the openjdk:8-jdk Docker image globally and python:3.6 images for specific lint and test jobs. Define variables ANDROID_BUILD_TOOLS, ANDROID_COMPILE_SDK, ANDROID_SDK_TOOLS and a global before_script that installs Android SDK tools, runs sdkmanager to update and install platforms; sets ANDROID_HOME and PATH; makes ./gradlew executable; and sets MINIMUM_COVERAGE=100. Add a cache for .m2/ and .gradle/. Define stages lint, build, android_test, deploy, api_test. In the lint stage create lint_android job that runs ./gradlew lint and stores app/build/reports/ as artifacts, and lint_flask job (image python:3.6) that runs pip install -r requirements.txt then cd api && python manage.py lint. In the build stage create build_debug job (except master) that runs ./gradlew assembleDebug and saves app/build/outputs/ as artifacts, and build_release job (only master) that runs ./gradlew assembleRelease and saves the same artifacts. In the android_test stage create android_unit_test job that runs ./gradlew clean test jacocoTestReport --stacktrace then cat app/build/reports/jacoco/jacocoTestReport/html/index.html, captures coverage with regex /Total.*?([0-9]{1,3})%/, and stores app/build/reports/ as artifacts expiring in 1 week. In the deploy stage add api_deploy_development job (only sit_uat) that apt-get updates, installs ruby-dev, gem installs dpl, then dpl --provider=heroku --app=klilink-development --api-key=$HEROKU_API_KEY, and api_deploy_production job (only master) that performs the same steps but deploys to klilink-api. In the api_test stage add restful_test job (image python:3.6) with before_script pip install -r requirements.txt, then cd api && python manage.py unittest, capturing coverage with regex /\d+%\s*$/.
